name: PacketFence device
author: Custom
description: Unified PacketFence device card. Two source modes: 'event' (listens for pf:deviceSelected, mcs:cameraSelected, or sw:portSelected — single device card) or 'host_items' (override-host + MAC-list item — multi-device cards for a switch port). Subsumes the original packetfence and milestone_camera_packetfence widgets.
